params.name: Visconti-Sforza Tarot
params.description: The Visconti-Sforza Tarot is one of the oldest surviving tarot decks, created in the mid-15th century, commissioned by the Visconti family, Dukes of Milan, and painted by artist Bonifacio Bembo.
